summary: Iteration 47 - Tested SSRTE standalone removal from cooperative dashboard and new SSRTE analytics endpoints. SSRTE button successfully removed from cooperative header. Route /cooperative/ssrte does NOT exist in App.js. Admin SSRTE Analytics page loads with KPIs, risk distribution, conditions sections. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: ssrte_analytics.py route takes precedence over ssrte.py - the new admin-only dashboard code is never executed.

critical.issue: Route conflict: ssrte_analytics.py (line 24) defines /dashboard BEFORE ssrte.py (line 696). The new admin-only endpoint in ssrte.py is NEVER reached. ssrte_analytics.py allows cooperative access.
critical.root_cause: In server.py line 136-137, ssrte_analytics router is included BEFORE ssrte router. First matching route wins.
critical.solution: Either: 1) Remove duplicate /dashboard from ssrte_analytics.py, 2) Change route order in server.py, or 3) Merge the endpoints into one file

critical.issue: Frontend SSRTEAnalytics.jsx expects living_conditions data (conditions_distribution, eau_courante_percent, etc.) but the active ssrte_analytics.py route does NOT return it. Frontend shows 0% for all living_conditions.
critical.solution: Update ssrte_analytics.py to include living_conditions data OR fix route order to use ssrte.py version

critical.issue: Same issue - ssrte_analytics.py defines /leaderboard with cooperative access allowed. New admin-only code in ssrte.py is never reached.

integration_issues.issue: All living_conditions values show 0% because backend does not return this data (route conflict issue)

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix route conflict in server.py - ssrte_analytics.py is loaded before ssrte.py causing /api/ssrte/dashboard endpoint in ssrte.py to be unreachable
Update ssrte_analytics.py to match the new admin-only access requirement OR delete duplicate endpoints from ssrte_analytics.py
Ensure /api/ssrte/dashboard returns living_conditions data for the frontend to display properly
critical_code_review_comments: BUG: server.py line 136-137 includes ssrte_analytics.router BEFORE ssrte.router - first route match wins, so ssrte.py endpoints are shadowed
VERIFIED: Cooperative dashboard (Dashboard.jsx) has SSRTE button REMOVED from header - only Accueil, Profil, Ajouter Membre visible
VERIFIED: Route /cooperative/ssrte does NOT exist in App.js - requirement met
VERIFIED: Admin SSRTE Analytics page /admin/ssrte-analytics loads correctly with all sections
VERIFIED: Frontend gracefully handles missing living_conditions data by showing 0%
ssrte_analytics.py line 18-21 allows cooperative/field_agent access to /dashboard endpoint - should be admin-only per requirements

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 tests passed - including bug verification tests)
success_rate.frontend: 90% (Cooperative dashboard correct, Admin page loads but missing data due to backend bug)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 32 SSRTE visits in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL: There's a route conflict between ssrte_analytics.py and ssrte.py. Both define /api/ssrte/dashboard but ssrte_analytics.py is loaded first and takes precedence. The new admin-only code in ssrte.py (line 696-868) with living_conditions data is NEVER executed. Frontend shows SSRTE Analytics page correctly but living_conditions shows 0% because backend doesn't return it. Cooperative dashboard SSRTE button removal is verified working.

route_conflict.description: ssrte_analytics.py and ssrte.py both define /api/ssrte/dashboard and /api/ssrte/leaderboard endpoints
route_conflict.impact: New admin-only code with living_conditions data in ssrte.py is never reached

features_verified.route_cooperative_ssrte_removed: PASS - Route does not exist in App.js
features_verified.admin_ssrte_analytics_page_loads: PASS - KPIs, risk distribution, conditions sections render
features_verified.backend_dashboard_returns_living_conditi: FAIL - Not returned due to route conflict
features_verified.backend_dashboard_admin_only_access: FAIL - Cooperative can access due to route conflict
